purpose: Controls coffee extraction process through tamping, pre-infusion, and brewing with precise pressure and timing control

inputs.name: ground_coffee
inputs.description: Mass of ground coffee loaded into chamber

inputs.name: cake_thickness
inputs.description: Target thickness of coffee cake after tamping

inputs.name: relax_time
inputs.description: Relaxation time between tamping and extraction

inputs.name: bypass_quantity
inputs.description: Percentage of water bypassing coffee cake

states.name: powder_distribution_quality
states.description: Quality of coffee powder distribution in chamber, degrades with usage cycles

states.name: tamping_consistency
states.description: Consistency of electronic tamping mechanism, degrades with repeated use

events.name: bean_hopper_empty_locked
events.description: Insufficient coffee distribution quality indicating empty hopper or mechanical lock

parameters.name: distribution_degradation_cycles
parameters.description: Number of cycles for powder distribution to degrade significantly

parameters.name: tamping_degradation_cycles
parameters.description: Number of cycles for tamping consistency to degrade significantly

parameters.name: base_flow_rate
parameters.description: Base coffee flow rate under ideal conditions

parameters.name: base_extraction_time
parameters.description: Base extraction time under ideal conditions

parameters.name: flow_degradation_factor
parameters.description: Factor by which degraded states reduce flow rate

parameters.name: time_degradation_factor
parameters.description: Factor by which degraded states increase extraction time

parameters.name: hopper_empty_threshold
parameters.description: Powder distribution quality threshold indicating empty hopper

state_transition_logic: powder_distribution_quality decreases by (coffee_cycles / distribution_degradation_cycles) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
tamping_consistency decreases by (coffee_cycles / tamping_degradation_cycles) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: brewed_coffee = base_flow_rate * powder_distribution_quality * tamping_consistency * (ground_coffee / 24.0) * flow_degradation_factor if degraded, otherwise base_flow_rate * (ground_coffee / 24.0)
extraction_time = base_extraction_time * (1 + (1 - powder_distribution_quality) * time_degradation_factor) * (1 + (1 - tamping_consistency) * time_degradation_factor)
assumptions: Coffee quality degrades primarily through powder distribution and tamping mechanism wear
Degradation is proportional to number of brewing cycles performed
Water temperature and timing parameters affect extraction but do not cause mechanical degradation
Empty hopper condition manifests as severely degraded powder distribution quality
